visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a toy store aisle filled with colorful boxes. The woman on the right wears a navy beret and blue sweater, holding a green and gold toy box. The woman on the left wears a black top and a pearl necklace. Yellow and black text overlays appear at the top and bottom. (2) The camera zooms slightly as the two women talk, gesturing towards the box. The background shows shelves packed with various collectible toy boxes and gift items under bright indoor lighting. (3) The women each hold a box and begin to peel off the top cardboard. The woman in the black top looks down at her box as she tears it open. The woman in blue smiles at the camera. (4) The woman in black pulls out a green plush toy encased in a clear plastic shell. She holds it up to the camera, showing a pink pig face with a green hood. (5) The woman in the blue sweater suddenly produces another toy in a plastic shell, appearing highly excited with an open-mouthed expression. She holds up a dark blue/grey fuzzy plush toy. (6) Both women pose together, each holding their respective plushies. The woman in blue holds the rare blue plush toy close to her face, smiling broadly as the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 抽到隱藏款. [Slogan]: LULU豬糖膠娃. (2) [Subtitle]: 一個只要360元. (3) [Subtitle]: 你最想要哪一個. (4) [Subtitle]: 我最想要. [Variety]: 封面款. (5) [Subtitle]: 來抽抽看. (6) [Subtitle]: 我選一盒. (7) [Subtitle]: 我也選一個打開. (8) [Subtitle]: 我把頭撕掉了. (9) [Subtitle]: 你抽到誰. (10) [Variety]: 勇敢小豬. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個綠色好可愛哦. (12) [Variety]: 大隱藏!. (13) [Variety]: 哇. (14) [Slogan]: 超低機率 1/96. (15) [Variety]: 調皮泰迪. (16) [Subtitle]: 想不到吧. (17) [Slogan]: 按下愛心得好運.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators interacting with products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair, wearing a black cold-shoulder top and a pearl necklace. The other has shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a navy beret, a blue sweater, and a white lace vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A retail store aisle filled with diverse collectible blind boxes, 'LuLu the Pig' themed merchandise, and various gift shop items on white shelving units.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voices engage in fast-paced dialogue over a bright, rhythmic electronic pop BGM. A 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the initial presentation of the product. (2) Vocal pitch increases as they discuss their preferences. Short 'pop' sound effects accentuate the rhythm of the speech. (3) A distinct paper-tearing sound occurs as they open the boxes, followed by a 'boing' comic SFX. (4) A 'ding' sound and a sparkling synth texture accompany the reveal of the green plush, with the speaker's voice exhibiting high positive valence. (5) A sharp, high-pitched gasp and exclamation from the second speaker trigger a series of magical 'twinkle' SFX and a dramatic cinematic 'hit' sound as the rare toy is revealed. (6) The voices remain enthusiastic and high-arousal through the closing call to action, with the music maintaining a steady upbeat tempo until the track cuts out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the unboxing of 'LuLu the Pig' blind boxes in a retail setting, generate excitement through the discovery of a rare 'hidden style' item, and drive social media engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on opening and showcasing a specific brand's product with pricing information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social-media unboxing format with high visual and auditory stimulus to maximize viewer retention.
